summary: Full proactive regression across auth/onboarding, super-admin (CRUD, trial extend/comp, PayPal config), tenant gallery mgmt (create/upload/shares/QR PDF/notify), gallery-limit 402, tenant settings (prints, SMTP, templates, orders), public share (meta/access/favourite/single-download/streaming ZIP/print-order manual), plus UI regression on Public Share (landing hero, album view, lightbox, Order Prints modal, Slideshow with music picker, theme toggle, session persistence, super-admin console). Backend: 28/28 pytest pass in 9s. Frontend: no console errors, no crashes. Every major flow works. Cleanup verified — no leftover TEST_/qa+ tenants, shares, galleries, orders, or templates.

ui_bugs.issue: Stale marketing text 'Secure card payments via Stripe. PayPal coming soon.' — PayPal is now a fully-shipped feature (super-admin config + /share/{token}/print-order + capture flow). Text is misleading for photographers.
Modal does not close on Escape key (only backdrop click / X). Inconsistent with ShareLightbox/Slideshow which honour Escape.
Prev/next chevron buttons lack data-testid — makes progressive-lightbox navigation hard to assert in automated tests (keyboard-only fallback works).

issues: Two rows named 'Demo Studio' with mismatched admin emails: 'newmail@example.com' (2/30) and 'demo@studioapp.uk' (5/30). The documented login credential 'demo@studio-app.uk' (with hyphen) does not visibly correspond to either tenant.email shown here — login still works because auth queries the admins collection. Data-hygiene / dedup opportunity before production.

action_items: Remove or replace 'PayPal coming soon' copy in AdminSettings.js (Billing tab) — the feature is live.
Add data-testid=lb-prev and data-testid=lb-next to ShareLightbox chevron buttons (small testability win).
Add Escape-to-close handler in PrintOrderModal for consistency with other modals.

(Data hygiene) Merge/rename the duplicate 'Demo Studio' tenants and confirm demo@studio-app.uk is set as tenant.email on the correct row so super-admin listing matches the documented login credential.
critical_code_review_comments: public_share._require_download_access() still only enforces JWT grant when has_password=true; for public download-enabled shares any grant is accepted (link IS the auth). Confirm this is intentional before prod (already flagged in iter 11).

orders.py _pp_create / _pp_capture use synchronous requests.post inside run_in_threadpool — OK, but there is no retry/backoff and no PayPal webhook handler; capture depends on user hitting return_url. For production, add a webhook or reconciliation job.

email._send raises HTTPException even from run_expiry_reminders — caught silently by generic except (never retried, no failure log). Consider structured logging so tenants can see why reminders didn't go out.
galleries.upload_files reads the entire file body into memory (await uf.read()) — fine for a few MB but risky for the 500MB videos referenced elsewhere. Consider chunked writes.

storage_client + logo upload path: uploads.py builds logo_url via resolve_public_base() at write time. If PUBLIC_BASE_URL is unset the URL becomes '/api/public/asset/<id>' (relative). Guard against empty base like the expiry reminder does.
test_credentials: Super admin: superadmin / Stu!d10App_2026xQ. Demo tenant: demo@studio-app.uk / Demo!2026. Public share: /s/eva-ella-27-06-26 (open, download access, 6 files).
seed_data_creation: Test creates: 3 tenants (TEST_Pro, TEST_Signup, TEST_Limit) via super-admin + register endpoints, 1 gallery + 1 photo + 2 shares under demo tenant, 1 email template, 1 print size, 1 manual print order. ALL cleaned up in teardown (verified via direct Mongo count).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 12 = broad proactive regression. Test file /app/backend/tests/test_iteration_12_regression.py (28 tests). Uses REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL from env with fallback to reading /app/frontend/.env. PayPal config is cleared to empty after TestSuperAdmin.test_paypal_config_masks_secret so downstream print-order tests exercise the manual (paypal=false, status=awaiting_contact) path. Run: pytest tests/test_iteration_12_regression.py -o addopts=''.
rca of the issue: No production bug — this was proactive regression. Only cosmetic / testability findings surfaced. All critical flows (auth, gallery CRUD, share links, QR PDF, streaming ZIP, favourites, prints modal, super-admin) verified end-to-end.
